phase_b_soft_proposal.brief_rationale: Phase A flagged secret or credential material. The effective soft proposal keeps only generic security-review context and does not preserve the sensitive content.
phase_b_soft_proposal.summary_short: Security-sensitive input was detected and withheld from memory candidacy.

phase_b_soft_proposal_model_raw.brief_rationale: The request involves accessing a private SSH key file (id_rsa) which contains sensitive credentials. This requires security review to ensure proper handling of private keys and prevent unauthorized access or exposure.
phase_b_soft_proposal_model_raw.suggested_followup_question: Which specific security policies or local memory storage guidelines should govern the handling of this SSH private key content?
phase_b_soft_proposal_model_raw.summary_short: SSH private key file access request
